{{CargoRelic
|name=Yayoi's Light
|class_id=20550
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The third principle of the natural cycle: The best time to sow hope and work hard is when all things revive, striving for a bountiful harvest in autumn!
|fame=12
|art=15
|fth=14
|civ=33
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail ATK +1<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail ATK +2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail ATK +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail ATK +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail ATK +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400<br> (Awakened)
}}
